page: Google Cloud Platform z3-highmem-8-highlssd is a memory-optimized server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8481C processor. It features 8 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 4 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled. The system is equipped with 64 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8 GB per core. It includes a bundled 3221 GB NVMe local SSD for high-speed storage, while containing no GPU accelerators.

Benchmark results place this instance in the average performance tier across multiple workloads. The single-core and multi-core Geekbench scores are 1694.0 and 6517.0, respectively. Memory bandwidth tests show read speeds of 544.21 GB/sec for small cached blocks, dropping to 53.42 GB/sec for large uncached blocks, with write speeds at 33.03 GB/sec. The processor supports advanced instruction sets including AVX-512 and Intel AMX (Advanced Matrix Extensions), which assist in specialized workloads.

This instance is well-suited for memory-intensive applications, database operations, and local caching layers, as demonstrated by a Redis SET performance of 8.92 million operations per second and a Passmark database score of 3908.44. However, it exhibits limitations in larger computational tasks; for example, LLM text generation using a medium 7B model drops to a weak tier at 7.36 tokens per second. The high-capacity local NVMe storage and high memory density make it a cost-efficient choice for workloads requiring rapid local data access without the overhead of external storage.
description: Google Cloud Platform z3-highmem-8-highlssd is an x86_64 memory-optimized server configured with 8 dedicated vCPUs, 64 GB of RAM, and a bundled 3221 GB NVMe local SSD. Powered by an Intel Xeon 8481C processor running at 2.7 GHz, it features 4 physical cores and a 105 MB L3 cache. The instance delivers average performance across standard benchmarks, with a Geekbench multi-core score of 6517.0 and a Redis SET throughput of 8.92 million operations per second. Its hardware profile is optimized for memory-heavy and storage-intensive tasks, though it shows performance trade-offs in complex computations such as medium-sized LLM text generation. This server is best suited for databases, caching layers, and applications requiring high-density memory combined with fast local storage.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform z3-highmem-8-highlssd is an x86_64 memory-optimized server featuring 8 dedicated vCPUs, 64 GB of RAM, and a 3221 GB NVMe local SSD, designed for database and memory-intensive workloads.
meta_description: Google Cloud Platform z3-highmem-8-highlssd is an 8-vCPU, 64 GB RAM memory-optimized server with a 3221 GB NVMe SSD and Intel Xeon processor.
tagline: A memory-optimized x86_64 server featuring high-capacity local NVMe storage and dedicated Intel Xeon processing for database and caching workloads.
bullet_points: 8 dedicated vCPUs and 64 GB of RAM providing 8 GB per core
Bundled 3221 GB local NVMe SSD for high-speed storage operations
Intel Xeon 8481C processor with AVX-512 and AMX instruction support
Redis performance of 8.92 million SET operations per second
Optimized for databases, caching layers, and memory-intensive applications
